plan_items.title: Foundation — shared models, DB schemas, config, utilities
plan_items.goal: Create all shared code and configuration for backend services, including Pydantic and SQLAlchemy models, DB connection logic, shared utilities, and Alembic migration scripts. This includes all models for users, news, sources, feedback, scoring config, enums, and constants. Also includes requirements.txt for all backend dependencies.

files.purpose: All Pydantic and SQLAlchemy models: User, NewsSource, NewsItem, Feedback, ScoringConfig, Token, enums/constants.
Shared SQLAlchemy DB connection logic, session management, and Alembic integration.
Shared utility functions (e.g., deduplication, normalization, scoring helpers).

plan_items.validation: `pytest backend/shared/tests/` passes; `alembic upgrade head` creates all tables; importing models in both services works without error.

plan_items.title: Auth Service — registration, login, JWT, user info
plan_items.goal: Implement the authentication microservice with endpoints for user registration (`POST /api/auth/register`), login (`POST /api/auth/login`), and user info (`GET /api/auth/me`). Enforce RBAC, JWT issuance/validation, password hashing, and healthcheck. Use shared models and config from Item 1.

files.purpose: FastAPI app entrypoint, includes `/health` endpoint.
Endpoints: `/api/auth/register`, `/api/auth/login`, `/api/auth/me`.
User CRUD logic: create, get, authenticate, password hashing.
SQLAlchemy models for users (imports from shared/models.py).
FastAPI dependencies: get_current_user, role checks, DB session.
JWT encode/decode, password hashing (bcrypt), token utilities.
Wait for DB, run migrations, seed users if empty, start service.

plan_items.validation: `pytest backend/auth-service/tests/` passes; `curl localhost:23002/health` returns status; registration/login/me endpoints work with JWT.

plan_items.title: News Service — ingestion, deduplication, classification, scoring, CRUD
plan_items.goal: Implement the news microservice with endpoints for news CRUD (`/api/news`, `/api/news/{id}`), source CRUD (`/api/sources`), feedback, and scoring config. Includes ingestion from RSS/APIs, deduplication, semantic classification (LLM API integration), scoring, and healthcheck. Uses shared models and config from Item 1.

files.purpose: FastAPI app entrypoint, includes `/health` endpoint.
Endpoints: `/api/news` (GET/POST), `/api/news/{id}` (GET/PATCH/DELETE), feedback, scoring config.
Endpoints: `/api/sources` (GET/POST).
News CRUD logic, ingestion, deduplication, classification, scoring.
Source CRUD logic.
SQLAlchemy models for news, sources (imports from shared/models.py).
FastAPI dependencies: get_current_user, role checks, DB session.
Wait for DB, run migrations, seed news/sources if empty, start service.

plan_items.validation: `pytest backend/news-service/tests/` passes; `curl localhost:23001/health` returns status; news CRUD and ingestion endpoints work, deduplication and scoring logic tested.

plan_items.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
plan_items.goal: Provide complete Docker orchestration and documentation for local and production deployment. Includes docker-compose.yml with all services, healthchecks, environment variable templates, run script, ignore files, and architecture docs.

files.purpose: Orchestrates all backend services, PostgreSQL, Redis (if used), with healthchecks and depends_on:service_healthy.
Validates Docker, builds images, starts all services, waits for healthy, prints access URLs.
Setup instructions, endpoints, troubleshooting, and test commands.

plan_items.validation: `./run.sh` completes with all services healthy, endpoints accessible, and seed data present; README instructions work end-to-end.

plan_items.title: Frontend Infrastructure Setup (React 18 + Vite)
plan_items.goal: Create ALL foundational React 18 + Vite files required before any page can run. This item MUST be completed first and completely. Includes: package.json, framework config with /api/* proxy, entrypoint, router / app shell with routes for all pages, base HTTP client (RELATIVE URLs ONLY), auth state management, nginx.conf (proxy /api/* → backend), multi-stage Dockerfile, and frontend service in docker-compose.yml. READ these context files before implementing: `docs/uiux/design-contract.md`, `docs/uiux/api-contract.yaml`, `docs/uiux/component-guide.md`.

design_specs.critical_constraint: NEVER use build-time env vars for the API URL (VITE_API_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL, NG_APP_API_URL, etc.). ALL HTTP calls MUST use RELATIVE paths (/api/...). The web server (nginx or framework dev proxy) routes /api/* to the backend container.
design_specs.proxy_pattern: Dev: framework config proxy (vite server.proxy, next.config rewrites, angular proxy.conf.json, etc.). Prod: nginx location /api/ { proxy_pass http://backend:23001/api/; }
design_specs.api_client: One shared api.ts (or api.js) module that ONLY uses relative paths. All pages/components import from this module — no direct fetch() calls in UI code.
design_specs.pages: DashboardPrincipal, ListadeNoticias, DetalledeNoticia, ReportesDinmicos, LoginPage, RegisterPage

files.purpose: react@18, react-dom@18, react-router-dom@6, @tanstack/react-query@5, axios. DevDeps: vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, typescript, @types/react, @playwright/test. Scripts: dev, build, preview, test:e2e.
plugins=[react()], server.proxy={ '/api': { target: 'http://backend:23001', changeOrigin: true } }. NO define block with API URLs.
TypeScript strict config, jsx: react-jsx, paths alias @/* → src/*.
<div id='root'> + <script type='module' src='/src/main.tsx'>
Bootstrap: ReactDOM.createRoot.render(<QueryClientProvider><BrowserRouter><AuthProvider><App /></AuthProvider></BrowserRouter></QueryClientProvider>)

<Routes> with one <Route> per page: /dashboardprincipal, /listadenoticias, /detalledenoticia, /reportesdinmicos, /login, /register. Catch-all → NotFoundPage. Protected routes wrapped in <RequireAuth>.
Base HTTP client. ONLY relative URLs. Reads JWT from localStorage('token'). Attaches Authorization: Bearer. Throws ApiError(message, status) on non-2xx.
React context: { user, token, login(), logout() }. Exports useAuth().

nginx: root /usr/share/nginx/html; try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html (SPA). location /api/ { proxy_pass http://backend:23001/api/; proxy_set_header Host $host; proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr; } listen 80.
Stage 1 (node:20-alpine AS builder): npm ci + npm run build. Stage 2 (nginx:alpine): COPY dist → /usr/share/nginx/html + nginx.conf. EXPOSE 80.
Add 'frontend' service: build: { context: ./frontend }, ports: ['3000:80'], depends_on: [backend], network: project_network. NO API_URL env vars in the environment block.

plan_items.validation: frontend/package.json exists. A framework config file exists (vite.config.*, next.config.js, angular.json, svelte.config.js, nuxt.config.ts, or equivalent). grep -rn 'http://localhost\|http://backend\|http://127\|API_URL' frontend/src returns ZERO matches — all API calls use relative paths. frontend/nginx.conf exists with proxy_pass for /api/. frontend/Dockerfile exists with at least two FROM stages (builder + runtime). docker-compose.yml has a 'frontend:' service entry with no *_API_URL environment vars.

plan_items.title: Frontend E2E Tests — Full-Stack Integration
plan_items.goal: Write Playwright E2E tests that drive real browser UI events and verify correct backend API responses. RULES: (1) Each test navigates to a real page. (2) Uses page.click()/fill()/select() to trigger actions. (3) Uses page.waitForResponse() to intercept and assert the correct API endpoint was called with correct payload. (4) Asserts backend response data appears in DOM. NO MOCKS — tests hit the real backend via docker-compose. API contract at `docs/uiux/api-contract.yaml`.

design_specs.no_mocks: NEVER use page.route() to return fake data — always let requests reach the real backend
design_specs.auth_pattern: await page.evaluate(() => localStorage.getItem('token')) to assert JWT stored

files.purpose: Register new user → intercept POST /api/auth/register, assert 201. Login → intercept POST /api/auth/login, assert token stored in localStorage. Access protected route → assert Authorization header sent. Logout → assert localStorage cleared.

Playwright config: baseURL='http://localhost:3000', testDir='./e2e', timeout=30000. Reference docs/uiux/api-contract.yaml for endpoint paths. No webServer block — assume docker-compose up is run externally.

plan_items.validation: playwright.config.ts exists with baseURL. Each spec file imports from @playwright/test only — no MSW, no fetch-mock. Tests use page.waitForResponse() to assert API calls — not just page.goto(). No hardcoded http://localhost:PORT in test assertions — use baseURL. Auth spec asserts localStorage contains token after login.

plan_items.title: Integration fix 5: Frontend build failed with 2 TypeScript error(s) in frontend/ director
plan_items.goal:
Frontend build failed with 2 TypeScript error(s) in frontend/ directory. Fix ALL TypeScript errors so `npm run build` passes with exit code 0. Common causes:
  - Missing esModuleInterop/allowSyntheticDefaultImports in tsconfig.json
  - Import path resolves to non-existent file (wrong '../' depth)
  - Missing type annotations or incorrect prop types
  - Undefined variables or missing imports
Build output (last 2000 chars):
```

> daily-pulse-frontend@1.0.0 build
> tsc && vite build

src/pages/ReportesDinamicosPage.tsx(4,1): error TS6133: 'NewsItem' is declared but its value is never read.
src/pages/ReportesDinamicosPage.tsx(151,43): error TS2339: Property 'relevance_score' does not exist on type 'NewsItem'.

```

IMPORTANT: After fixing, verify the fix is correct by re-reading the affected files and confirming the issue is fully resolved — do not leave partial fixes.
